name: claude-code-showcase
description: Reference plugins demonstrating skill, subagent, and MCP-server patterns for Claude Code teams.

plugins.name: draft-email
plugins.description: Single-skill plugin: /draft-email:draft writes a polite, well-structured email from a one-line description.

plugins.name: linkedin-post
plugins.description: Multi-skill orchestration plugin: interview the user, draft post text, generate an image, push the draft to LinkedIn. Includes a bundled stdio MCP server with credential-scoped tools and per-skill allowed-tools.

plugins.name: commit-helper
plugins.description: Mid-tier plugin demonstrating dynamic context injection (live shell output in skills), path-scoped skill activation, and a PreToolUse hook that blocks dangerous git commands.
